99.title: Ticket schema
99.heading: id
99.snippet: string Unique ticket identifier. Defaults to the filename (without .md) when omitted.

100.title: Ticket schema
100.heading: repo
100.snippet: string Absolute path to the target git repo; presence makes this a PR-flow ticket, absence a Q&A ticket.

101.title: Ticket schema
101.heading: priority
101.snippet: low | normal | high Scheduling priority. Defaults to normal.

102.heading: timeout_minutes
102.snippet: number Maximum execution time in minutes. Defaults to the daemon's configured default_timeout_minutes. Must be strict…

103.snippet: string Base branch for the pull request. Defaults to the daemon's configured default_base_branch. Constrained to the …

104.heading: branch_name
104.snippet: string Explicit name for the feature branch. Defaults to a generated slug from the ticket id. Constrained to the git-…

105.title: Ticket schema
105.heading: pr_title
105.snippet: string Pull request title. Defaults to the first H1 heading in the ticket body, or the ticket id.

106.title: Ticket schema
106.heading: draft
106.snippet: boolean Open the pull request as a draft. Defaults to the daemon's configured draft_by_default.

107.title: Ticket schema
107.heading: labels
107.snippet: array Labels to apply to the pull request. Merged with the daemon's configured default_labels.

108.title: Ticket schema
108.heading: reviewers
108.snippet: array GitHub handles to request as pull request reviewers.

109.title: Ticket schema
109.heading: amends_pr
109.snippet: number Pull request number to amend (push additional commits to) instead of opening a new PR.
